concerns.text: Spec FR-001 requires PhysioNet (clinical time-series) and PubMed (scientific abstracts). research.md shows NO verified sources for these. Substitutes (UCI_HAR, general text datasets) are NOT scientific/clinical domain data. This undermines the benchmark's ability to answer the research question about 'scientific foundation models' — the datasets don't match the intended domain.

TimeSeries-Transformer size marked as '<1 GB (assumed)' and 'Must verify weight size before Phase 2'. TabPFN-small and distilled LLM similarly unverified. If models exceed 1 GB or inference exceeds 5 minutes, the benchmark cannot run on the specified hardware (2 CPU, 7 GB RAM). This is a blocking feasibility risk.

Dataset sizes and empirical thresholds are deferred (correct per spec), but research.md should explicitly document which substitute datasets will be used for the 20 multi-modal tasks. Currently only 7 datasets are listed; task-to-dataset mapping is unclear.
